No Poverty.reason: The course content is entirely focused on tennis skills and leisure, with no mention of economic empowerment, social protection, or poverty reduction.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: As a physical education course, it directly promotes physical activity and a 'high-quality leisure life,' explicitly contributing to physical and mental well-being, aligning with Target 3.4.

Quality Education.reason: The course is a university-level offering, providing tertiary education (Target 4.3) and a strong focus on developing specific technical skills and concepts in tennis, which are clear learning outcomes.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: There is no mention of energy access, renewable energy, energy efficiency, or related infrastructure in the course description.
